column1: # bridge_health_history.tsv — per-bridge per-sweep timing history (ω-bridge-14 stub)
#   ts          ISO-8601 UTC of the sweep (e.g. 2026-04-26T12:34:56Z)
#   duration_ms integer wall-time of the per-bridge selftest (matches $DUR in
#               bridge_health.sh records seconds, ω-bridge-15 will normalise)
#   ec          numeric exit code from `hexa run <bridge> --selftest` (0 = OK,
# This stub seeds the canonical path. Until ω-bridge-15 lands, the analyzer will
# emit __BRIDGE_ANOMALY__ INSUFFICIENT_DATA for the default --history target.
# Operators may pre-populate this file by hand or pass --history PATH explicitly.
